requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Fire and Rescue Department Brunei Approval and Applicable Fire Code
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——文莱消防救援局审批及适用消防规范
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——汶萊消防救援局審批及適用消防規範

summary.en: The Fire and Rescue Department Brunei (Jabatan Bomba dan Penyelamat Brunei), under the Ministry of Home Affairs, is the authority having jurisdiction for fire safety in Brunei Darussalam. Fire safety approval from the Fire and Rescue Department is required for commercial and industrial facilities before commissioning. Brunei follows a mix of British Standards (BS) and IEC-aligned standards for electrical and building fire protection. NFPA codes are referenced in some project specifications in the region, but formal Brunei adoption of NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) for BESS installations has not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date. Exporters and project designers should confirm directly with the Fire and Rescue Department Brunei which fire code applies to stationary BESS installations — including whether NFPA 855, BS, or a local fire code governs — before finalising system design. BESS-specific fire code confirmation is a high-priority gap requiring direct authority engagement.
summary.zh: 文莱消防救援局（Jabatan Bomba dan Penyelamat Brunei）隶属于内政部，是文莱消防安全主管机关。商业及工业设施在调试前须取得消防救援局的消防安全审批。文莱对电气和建筑消防保护沿用英国标准（BS）和IEC对齐标准的混合体系。该地区部分项目规格引用了NFPA规范，但截至本数据集日期，文莱正式采纳NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）用于BESS安装尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认。出口商和项目设计方在最终确定系统设计前，应直接向文莱消防救援局确认适用于固定式BESS安装的消防规范——包括适用NFPA 855、BS还是地方消防规范。BESS专项消防规范的确认是需要直接与主管机关接触的高优先级差距。
summary.zht: 汶萊消防救援局（Jabatan Bomba dan Penyelamat Brunei）隸屬於內政部，是汶萊消防安全主管機關。商業及工業設施在調試前須取得消防救援局的消防安全審批。汶萊對電氣和建築消防保護沿用英國標準（BS）和IEC對齊標準的混合體系。該地區部分項目規格引用了NFPA規範，但截至本數據集日期，汶萊正式採納NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）用於BESS安裝尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認。出口商和項目設計方在最終確定系統設計前，應直接向汶萊消防救援局確認適用於固定式BESS安裝的消防規範——包括適用NFPA 855、BS還是地方消防規範。BESS專項消防規範的確認是需要直接與主管機關接觸的高優先級差距。

standards_or_laws: Fire and Rescue Department Brunei (Jabatan Bomba dan Penyelamat Brunei), Ministry of Home Affairs — fire safety approval authority for commercial and industrial facilities in Brunei

NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (internationally dominant BESS fire-installation code; formal Brunei adoption for BESS unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with Fire and Rescue Department Brunei)
BS 5306 — Fire extinguishing installations and equipment on premises (British Standard referenced in Brunei BS-aligned building regulations)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review governed by the Ministry of Emergency Management (MEM) and local fire authorities. GB/T 36558-2023 and GB/T 34120-2023 include system-level safety provisions covering fire-related requirements. GB 30981 governs fire-extinguishing product requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China requires local fire authority inspection and approval. Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Brunei's Fire and Rescue Department as equivalent to Brunei's applicable fire code requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with documentation aligned to the applicable Brunei fire code, as confirmed by the Fire and Rescue Department.
summary.zh: 中国通过应急管理部（MEM）和地方消防主管机关管控的强制性标准与项目级消防审查相结合方式管理BESS消防安全。GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2023包含涵盖消防相关要求的系统级安全规定。GB 30981管控灭火产品要求。中国项目级消防审查须经地方消防主管机关检查和审批。中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被文莱消防救援局认可为等同于文莱适用消防规范要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须补充经消防救援局确认的符合文莱适用消防规范的文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過應急管理部（MEM）和地方消防主管機關管控的強制性標準與項目級消防審查相結合方式管理BESS消防安全。GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2023包含涵蓋消防相關要求的系統級安全規定。GB 30981管控滅火產品要求。中國項目級消防審查須經地方消防主管機關檢查和審批。中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被汶萊消防救援局認可為等同於汶萊適用消防規範要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須補充經消防救援局確認的符合汶萊適用消防規範的文件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems; includes system-level fire safety provisions)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for BESS connected to distribution network)
GB 30981 — 建筑灭火器配置设计规范 (fire extinguisher design requirements for buildings)

gap.en: Gap: Fire and Rescue Department Brunei approval is a mandatory project gate for BESS installations in Brunei. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy Brunei fire-authority requirements. The primary unresolved gap is the applicable fire code — whether NFPA 855, BS, or a Brunei-specific code governs stationary BESS fire safety design has not been confirmed from official sources. Exporters and project teams should: (a) confirm directly with the Fire and Rescue Department Brunei the applicable fire code for stationary BESS installations and any Brunei-specific requirements before system design is commenced; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with the confirmed applicable code — at minimum addressing thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) ensure fire-suppression system equipment is certified by a recognised laboratory where required by the applicable code or fire authority; (d) engage a Brunei-licensed fire protection engineer for design review and fire authority application submission.
gap.zh: 差距：文莱消防救援局审批是文莱BESS安装的强制项目门槛。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足文莱消防主管机关要求。主要未解决差距是适用消防规范——NFPA 855、BS还是文莱专项规范管控固定式BESS消防安全设计尚未从官方来源得到确认。出口商和项目团队应：（a）在开始系统设计前直接向文莱消防救援局确认固定式BESS安装适用的消防规范及任何文莱专项要求；（b）准备符合已确认适用规范的BESS消防安全设计文件——至少涵盖热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离；（c）确保消防抑制系统设备在适用规范或消防主管机关要求时经认可实验室认证；（d）聘请持文莱执照的消防工程师进行设计审查和消防主管机关申请提交。
gap.zht: 差距：汶萊消防救援局審批是汶萊BESS安裝的強制項目門檻。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足汶萊消防主管機關要求。主要未解決差距是適用消防規範——NFPA 855、BS還是汶萊專項規範管控固定式BESS消防安全設計尚未從官方來源得到確認。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）在開始系統設計前直接向汶萊消防救援局確認固定式BESS安裝適用的消防規範及任何汶萊專項要求；（b）準備符合已確認適用規範的BESS消防安全設計文件——至少涵蓋熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離；（c）確保消防抑制系統設備在適用規範或消防主管機關要求時經認可實驗室認證；（d）聘請持汶萊執照的消防工程師進行設計審查和消防主管機關申請提交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Fire and Rescue Department Brunei approval is required for commercial and industrial facilities including BESS installations; applicable fire code for stationary BESS has not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with Fire and Rescue Department Brunei
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

source.publisher: Ministry of Home Affairs, Brunei Darussalam (parent authority of Fire and Rescue Department Brunei)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Fire and Rescue Department Brunei approval is a mandatory installation gate for commercial and industrial BESS in Brunei. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy Brunei fire-authority requirements. The applicable fire code for stationary BESS (NFPA 855, BS, or local code) has not been confirmed from official sources — engage the Fire and Rescue Department Brunei and a licensed fire protection engineer at the earliest project stage before committing to system layout or equipment specification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 文莱消防救援局审批是文莱商业及工业BESS装置的强制安装门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足文莱消防主管机关要求。固定式BESS适用消防规范（NFPA 855、BS或地方规范）尚未从官方来源得到确认——在确定系统布局或设备规格前，应在项目最早阶段与文莱消防救援局及持牌消防工程师接触。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 汶萊消防救援局審批是汶萊商業及工業BESS裝置的強制安裝門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足汶萊消防主管機關要求。固定式BESS適用消防規範（NFPA 855、BS或地方規範）尚未從官方來源得到確認——在確定系統布局或設備規格前，應在項目最早階段與汶萊消防救援局及持牌消防工程師接觸。

requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Compartmentation and Thermal Runaway Mitigation — Tropical Climate Considerations
requirement_topic.zh: BESS防火分区和热失控缓解——热带气候考量
requirement_topic.zht: BESS防火分區和熱失控緩解——熱帶氣候考量

summary.en: BESS installations in Brunei must address fire compartmentation, thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, and thermal management design adapted to Brunei's tropical climate. Brunei experiences high ambient temperatures (typically 28–35°C) and very high relative humidity (frequently above 80%), which affect BESS cell degradation rates, thermal management system performance, and cooling system derating requirements. BESS enclosures and thermal management systems must be designed to maintain battery cells within manufacturer-specified operating temperature ranges under Brunei's ambient conditions. Thermal runaway propagation mitigation — preventing a single cell event from cascading to adjacent cells, modules, or racks — is an internationally expected design requirement under NFPA 855 and IEC 62933-5-1. The applicable standard for fire compartmentation design in Brunei must be confirmed with the Fire and Rescue Department. Additionally, BESS enclosures must have adequate ingress protection (IP rating) for outdoor tropical environments, typically IP55 or higher.
summary.zh: 文莱的BESS安装须解决防火分区、热失控蔓延缓解及适应文莱热带气候的热管理设计。文莱环境温度高（通常28–35°C）且相对湿度极高（频繁超过80%），影响BESS电芯降解速率、热管理系统性能和冷却系统降额要求。BESS外壳和热管理系统须设计为在文莱环境条件下将电池电芯保持在制造商规定的工作温度范围内。热失控蔓延缓解——防止单个电芯事件扩散至相邻电芯、模组或机架——是NFPA 855和IEC 62933-5-1下的国际预期设计要求。文莱防火分区设计适用标准须向消防救援局确认。此外，BESS外壳须具备适合户外热带环境的足够防护等级（IP等级），通常为IP55或更高。
summary.zht: 汶萊的BESS安裝須解決防火分區、熱失控蔓延緩解及適應汶萊熱帶氣候的熱管理設計。汶萊環境溫度高（通常28–35°C）且相對濕度極高（頻繁超過80%），影響BESS電芯降解速率、熱管理系統性能和冷却系統降額要求。BESS外殼和熱管理系統須設計為在汶萊環境條件下將電池電芯保持在製造商規定的工作溫度範圍內。熱失控蔓延緩解——防止單個電芯事件擴散至相鄰電芯、模組或機架——是NFPA 855和IEC 62933-5-1下的國際預期設計要求。汶萊防火分區設計適用標準須向消防救援局確認。此外，BESS外殼須具備適合戶外熱帶環境的足夠防護等級（IP等級），通常為IP55或更高。

standards_or_laws: NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (thermal runaway mitigation, separation distances, fire compartmentation for BESS; formal Brunei adoption unconfirmed — verify with Fire and Rescue Department Brunei)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level thermal runaway propagation assessment)
IEC 60529 — Degrees of Protection Provided by Enclosures (IP Code) — enclosure protection rating for tropical outdoor BESS installations
IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (cell-level thermal runaway containment evidence)

summary.en: Chinese BESS fire compartmentation and thermal runaway mitigation requirements are addressed in GB/T 36558-2023 and GB/T 34120-2023. Chinese manufacturing standards typically specify thermal management performance under China's climate conditions (test ambient often 25°C or standard conditions). Chinese BESS products deployed in tropical climates such as Brunei may experience reduced cooling performance and accelerated cell degradation due to higher ambient temperatures and humidity, even if the BESS enclosure has been validated to Chinese standards. Chinese thermal management validation reports based on Chinese standard ambient conditions may not demonstrate adequate performance under Brunei's tropical ambient conditions and may require supplementary tropical climate derating analysis.
summary.zh: 中国BESS防火分区和热失控缓解要求在GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2023中规定。中国制造标准通常在中国气候条件下规定热管理性能（测试环境温度通常为25°C或标准条件）。部署于文莱等热带气候的中国BESS产品，即使外壳已通过中国标准验证，也可能因更高环境温度和湿度而出现冷却性能下降和电芯加速降解。基于中国标准环境条件的中国热管理验证报告可能无法证明在文莱热带环境条件下的充分性能，可能需要补充热带气候降额分析。
summary.zht: 中國BESS防火分區和熱失控緩解要求在GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2023中規定。中國製造標準通常在中國氣候條件下規定熱管理性能（測試環境溫度通常為25°C或標準條件）。部署於汶萊等熱帶氣候的中國BESS產品，即使外殼已通過中國標準驗證，也可能因更高環境溫度和濕度而出現冷却性能下降和電芯加速降解。基於中國標準環境條件的中國熱管理驗證報告可能無法證明在汶萊熱帶環境條件下的充分性能，可能需要補充熱帶氣候降額分析。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (includes thermal management and fire safety requirements for grid-connected BESS in China)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (includes environmental and enclosure requirements for BESS)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese BESS thermal management and fire compartmentation documentation validated under Chinese standard ambient conditions (typically 25°C, standard humidity) does not demonstrate adequacy for Brunei's tropical environment. Exporters must: (a) provide thermal management derating analysis for Brunei's ambient conditions (28–35°C, >80% RH) covering HVAC/cooling system capacity, cell temperature rise under peak ambient, and projected impact on cycle life and capacity degradation; (b) confirm IP rating of BESS enclosure is adequate for Brunei's tropical outdoor conditions (typically IP55 or higher); (c) provide thermal-runaway propagation mitigation evidence aligned with the applicable fire code confirmed by the Fire and Rescue Department Brunei — Chinese GB documentation alone will not satisfy this requirement; (d) confirm anti-condensation controls for humidity management inside BESS enclosures given Brunei's high relative humidity.
gap.zh: 差距：在中国标准环境条件下（通常25°C、标准湿度）验证的中国BESS热管理和防火分区文件无法证明对文莱热带环境的充分性。出口商须：（a）提供针对文莱环境条件（28–35°C、>80% RH）的热管理降额分析，涵盖HVAC/冷却系统容量、峰值环境温度下的电芯温升及对循环寿命和容量降解的预计影响；（b）确认BESS外壳IP等级足以满足文莱热带户外条件（通常IP55或更高）；（c）提供符合文莱消防救援局确认的适用消防规范的热失控蔓延缓解证据——仅中国GB文件无法满足此要求；（d）鉴于文莱高相对湿度，确认BESS外壳内的防冷凝控制以进行湿度管理。
gap.zht: 差距：在中國標準環境條件下（通常25°C、標準濕度）驗證的中國BESS熱管理和防火分區文件無法證明對汶萊熱帶環境的充分性。出口商須：（a）提供針對汶萊環境條件（28–35°C、>80% RH）的熱管理降額分析，涵蓋HVAC/冷却系統容量、峰值環境溫度下的電芯溫升及對循環壽命和容量降解的預計影響；（b）確認BESS外殼IP等級足以滿足汶萊熱帶戶外條件（通常IP55或更高）；（c）提供符合汶萊消防救援局確認的適用消防規範的熱失控蔓延緩解證據——僅中國GB文件無法滿足此要求；（d）鑒於汶萊高相對濕度，確認BESS外殼內的防冷凝控制以進行濕度管理。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — tropical climate derating and fire compartmentation design are project requirements for BESS in Brunei; applicable fire code and specific requirements must be confirmed with Fire and Rescue Department Brunei
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under GB/T 36558-2023 for Chinese domestic BESS installations; tropical climate derating beyond Chinese standard conditions is not a domestic requirement — additional analysis required for Brunei deployment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese BESS thermal management documentation validated to Chinese standard ambient conditions is not sufficient for Brunei deployment. Prepare tropical climate derating analysis covering Brunei's high-temperature, high-humidity conditions. Confirm fire compartmentation and thermal runaway propagation mitigation requirements directly with Fire and Rescue Department Brunei. Verify BESS enclosure IP rating for outdoor tropical use. Anti-condensation controls inside BESS enclosures are required given Brunei's high relative humidity.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据中国标准环境条件验证的中国BESS热管理文件不足以用于文莱部署。需准备涵盖文莱高温高湿条件的热带气候降额分析。直接向文莱消防救援局确认防火分区和热失控蔓延缓解要求。核实BESS外壳用于户外热带使用的IP等级。鉴于文莱高相对湿度，BESS外壳内须设防冷凝控制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據中國標準環境條件驗證的中國BESS熱管理文件不足以用於汶萊部署。需準備涵蓋汶萊高溫高濕條件的熱帶氣候降額分析。直接向汶萊消防救援局確認防火分區和熱失控蔓延緩解要求。核實BESS外殼用於戶外熱帶使用的IP等級。鑒於汶萊高相對濕度，BESS外殼內須設防冷凝控制。
